/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/smartcam.dir/smartcam_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smartcam.dir/src/display/gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smartcam.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o smartcam  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.8
